channel.title: The Grant Desk - Cross-disciplinary & Social Impact, US
channel.description: Paid open calls, fellowships and residencies in AI, tech, research, and digital and mixed-media arts, sorted into the right pile. Updated as new calls land on the desk. Filtered to: Cross-disciplinary & Social Impact, US.

item.title: Pop Culture Collaborative: Rapid Response Grants - Up to $100,000 - Rolling / undated
item.description:
Pop Culture Collaborative

Location: United States (US-based applicants only; individuals must apply via fiscal sponsorship)

Award: Up to $100,000

Duration: Per project

Deadline: Rolling / undated

Rolling rapid-response funding for projects that respond to or anticipate peak and timely cultural moments, using cultural and behavioral change approaches. Funds content development, audience engagement strategies and narrative environment creation. Eligible applicants: US-based nonprofits, for-profit companies, and individuals with fiscal sponsorship. The mass-audience requirement is hard: projects must reach 1 million people or more (PCC orients its grantmaking around shifting the narrative ocean for marginalised communities at scale). Process: (1) review the Rapid Response guidelines and the Grantmaking FAQ; (2) take the self-assessment quiz on PCC's site; (3) submit a brief idea (not a full proposal) via the Airtable portal at any time. NOTE: full proposals are by invitation only. PCC staff review idea submissions on a rolling basis and reach out only to matching submissions; most idea submissions will not progress to a full proposal. Treat the idea-intake as a low-cost LOI-style inquiry rather than a guaranteed open RFP. Sister tracks at PCC: Infrastructure Grants and the Becoming America Fund (different remit and process). Strong fit for organisations doing narrative-and-pop-culture work, especially aligned with marginalised-community media strategies.

Open call details

Want to see more grants? Visit The Grant Desk (https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/).

item.title: Impact Award for Native American Art - $25,000 fellowship - Closed 27 Apr 2026
item.description:
Harpo Foundation

Location: USA (open to applicants worldwide)

Award: $25,000 fellowship

Duration: One-time award

Deadline: Closed 27 Apr 2026

Fellowship to amplify the contributions of under-recognised Native American contemporary visual artists.

Open call details

Want to see more grants? Visit The Grant Desk (https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/).

item.title: Knight Cities Challenge 2026 - Up to $200,000 per project ($5M total pool) - deadline 30 Apr 2026
item.description:
Knight Foundation

Location: 26 Knight communities, USA

Award: Up to $200,000 per project ($5M total pool)

Duration: 1 year (project completion)

Deadline: 30 Apr 2026

Open call for individuals and organisations across Knight's 26 communities to submit creative ideas for projects that spark change and leave lasting local impact. Project ideas must focus on at least one of Knight's investment areas: strengthening local news and information, creating pathways for economic opportunity, or cultivating connection through arts, culture and shared places. Applications close 30 April 2026 at 11:59 PM ET.

Open call details

Want to see more grants? Visit The Grant Desk (https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/).
